steps.title: Identify the starting balance
steps.content:
In the function
$$f(n)=42-6n$$
the $42$ represents the starting amount in the account before any rentals are made.

steps.title: Read the per game decrease
steps.content: The term $-6n$ means the balance decreases by $6$ dollars for each game rented. The amount withdrawn each time is the positive cost, $6$ dollars. The answer is B.
